‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ E ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ
X X X X X

I want you to describe this grid to me, step by step. You don't need to describe the empty squares, which are denoted with "‚ĖĘ". Only describe the location of letters in the grid. Then you wait for me to say "What is your next command?", and then you continue with the next step. Take the size of the grid into consideration while giving commands. Only give the command and omit everything else.

What is your next command?
Command: Fill the last row with X

What is your next command?
Command: DONE

‚ĖĘ R ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ R

R ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ R ‚ĖĘ
‚ĖĘ R ‚ĖĘ ‚ĖĘ R
What is your next command?
